title: Voice AI that transcribes and takes action
summary: Keith AI presents a voice AI agent that transcribes spoken input and performs corresponding actions. The agent uses function calling to execute user requests.
writeup: This clip demonstrates Typewise's "ask" function, which operates as an on-device AI agent accessible from the keyboard. The demo shows two tasks: a live web search for recent news and a content rewrite that generates multiple Threads post variations from a single voice prompt. The core argument is that routing these tasks through a keyboard-level agent eliminates the copy-paste round-trip to ChatGPT, Claude, or Gemini.
key_points: Typewise's ask function acts as an AI agent embedded directly in the keyboard, letting a user trigger searches and content generation without leaving the current app.
A voice prompt asking for the latest updates on OpenAI triggers a live search result inline, demonstrating agent-mediated information retrieval from the keyboard layer.
A single voice request to rewrite a Threads post into three to five variations with different hooks produces four distinct outputs, covering a meaningful content task without switching apps.
The workflow eliminates the manual copy-paste loop to external chat interfaces (Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini), compressing a multi-step process into one voice command.
